nodes.context: Elite criminal society ruling the underworld in Soviet and post-Soviet states, originating in prison camps.
Former Vory who broke the code by cooperating with prison authorities and the Soviet government.
International criminal organization targeted by US sanctions in 2011, includes thieves-in-law.

edges.context: The Bitch Wars were a prison gang war between pure Vory and the Suki who broke the thieves' code.
